name: Company Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler, place caramels and half and half; melt caramels over boiling water, stirring often until smooth.
2. For the crust, stir together 3 cups flour, salt, and 1/4 cup sugar; cut in butter. Combine oil, cold water, and egg; stir into flour mixture, stirring to form dough.
3. Divide dough into thirds; roll out and place each in a pie pan.
4. Filling: divide apples among pie pans. Stir together 1 cup flour, 2 cups sugar, and lemon rind; sprinkle over apples. Drizzle with lemon juice.
5. Topping: beat cream cheese, 1/3 cup sugar, and egg in a mixing bowl. Spoon caramel sauce over pie in strips. Place cream cheese topping between caramel strips. Sprinkle chopped nuts over all.
6. Bake at 350°F for 50 to 60 minutes. Yield: 3 pies.
